calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Steven Huggins an individual.

Nicholas Mortl, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A.

No appearance by defendant Steven G. Huggins

Plaintiff's complaint for Open Book/Common Counts was filed on 7/8/2021 and personally served on defendant Sandra E Mejia on 9/13/2021

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A. and against the default defendant Steven G. Huggins, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,84.87.
Costs - $352.

Total - $5736.87

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Judge: Murlene J Randle. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. FTR commencing at 11:16 am

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The plaintiff withdrew the motion.
